name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation
notes: This Building Block triggers when a scheduled task is created.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000872) Success Audit: A scheduled task was created
when the event matches Command (custom) is any of %systemroot%\system32\usoclient.exe
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000872) Success Audit: A scheduled task was created
AND NOT when the event matches Command (custom) is any of %systemroot%\system32\usoclient.exe
